person.name: Preekshit Saklani
person.bio: A distinguished AI/ML specialist with expertise in deep learning, NLP, computer vision, and building production-grade AI systems.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence)

experience.description: Designed and developed a robust time-series forecasting model to predict hourly traffic volumes at urban junctions, engineered complex temporal features from historical datasets and weather patterns, implemented rigorous cross-validation pipelines and hyperparameter tuning in Python to minimize MAE and RMSE, conducted extensive exploratory data analysis using Pandas and Seaborn to identify traffic anomalies and correlation with environmental factors.

projects.name: Aether
projects.tagline: Competitive Intelligence Agent AI-Powered Market Analytics Platform
projects.description: Developed an autonomous AI agent capable of scraping and synthesizing vast amounts of company data to identify key market competitors. Built predictive analytics models to process collected data, generating strategic recommendations and actionable insights for business advantage. Integrated Natural Language Processing pipelines to perform sentiment analysis on competitor reviews and public metrics.

projects.name: Few-Shot Rare Disease Detection
projects.description: Developed a Style-based GAN pipeline with latent space manipulation to synthesize high-fidelity rare disease imagery for brain tumors from minimal samples. Engineered a Vision Transformer anomaly detection model trained on hybrid synthetic-real datasets, outperforming CNN baselines in low-data regimes. Integrated a Medical Knowledge Graph module that analyzes visual attention maps to recommend confirmatory tests and clinical next steps.

projects.name: Project Architect Athena
projects.tagline: Custom GPT Model & Autonomous Coding Environment
projects.description: Engineered a custom GPT-based Transformer model optimized for code generation, logical reasoning, and mathematical problem-solving, employing fine-tuning techniques to enhance domain-specific accuracy. Architected a sandboxed execution environment using Docker and Kubernetes, integrating a custom IDE that allows the model to autonomously write, compile, execute, and validate code in real-time. Developed a robust API layer to facilitate seamless interaction between the inference engine and the virtual environment, creating a closed-loop system for practical educational utility.

projects.name: Defai
projects.description: Won ETHOXford hackathon by building DEFAI. DEFAI stands for Decentralized Finance Artificial Intelligence. It's an AI-powered chat interface that simplifies on-chain operations on the Avalanche blockchain by allowing users to interact using natural language. This makes complex DeFi operations accessible even for those with limited technical expertise.

achievements.name: Research Publication
achievements.context: Published "Unlocking the Potential of Quantum Computers: A Comprehensive Review".

achievements.name: Hackathon Winner
achievements.context: Paper Presentation at the International Level Technical Symposium AURA 25.

achievements.name: Certification
achievements.context: Data Science Master Course (Coding Blocks), Full Stack Web Development (Coding Blocks), Workshop on Tableau and Visualization (UpGrad Campus).

achievements.name: Mumbai Hacks Finalist
achievements.context: HealthTech Track, selected for final in-person round.
